title: dactylostemon klotzschii var. genuinus
intro: Dactylostemon klotzschii var. genuinus, also known as the 'Guinea hen flower', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the Guinea hen flower include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
